name: Smily (BookingSync) API
description:
The Smily API (formerly BookingSync) provides comprehensive access to vacation rental and property management features. The API follows REST principles and uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication.

## Authentication

The API uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication. You'll need to register your application to obtain client credentials.

## Base URL

https://www.smily.com/api/v3
